name: single_match
description: One persona, user's groups contain its group -> that persona.

name: no_match_no_fallback
description: User belongs to no declared persona group and no fallback -> null (hard-deny).

name: no_match_with_fallback
description: No group matches but a fallback persona name is set -> the fallback persona.

name: multi_match_first_declared_wins
description: User is in two persona groups; declared order is precedence -> FIRST declared.

name: multi_match_order_reversed
description: Same membership as above but declared order reversed -> first declared still wins (sales).

name: empty_personas
description: No personas declared -> null regardless of groups.

name: empty_groups_no_fallback
description: User carries no groups and no fallback -> null.

name: empty_groups_with_fallback
description: User carries no groups but a fallback is set -> the fallback persona.

name: fallback_names_unknown_persona
description: Fallback set to a name that is not a declared persona -> null (match wins over a bad fallback only when there is a match; here there is none).

name: match_takes_precedence_over_fallback
description: A real group match is returned even when a (different) fallback is configured.

name: group_match_is_case_sensitive
description: Group comparison is exact string equality; a case-mismatch does not match -> null.

name: tolerates_extra_persona_keys
description: Persona dicts may carry extra keys (display_name, etc.); resolution keys only on group/name.
